Financial FAQ Hub

Get clear, expert answers to your most pressing financial and calculation questions.

Security & Data

Is my financial data stored on your servers? +

Absolutely not. Quick Financial Calculator operates on a client-side execution model. All calculations are performed directly in your browser. Once you close the tab, your data is gone forever.

Mortgages & Loans

How much house can I realistically afford? +

Lenders typically follow the 28/36 rule: your mortgage shouldn't exceed 28% of your gross monthly income, and total debt shouldn't exceed 36%.

→ Open Mortgage Calculator

Investment Math

What is the "Rule of 72"? +

The Rule of 72 is a quick formula to estimate how many years it will take to double your money. Simply divide 72 by your annual rate of return.

→ Calculate ROI

Need a Custom Calculation?

Explore our suite of audit-grade calculators to plan your financial future with confidence.
